framework.name: Payment-Method Agnosticism
framework.description: AP2 explicitly designed to support 'different payment types–from credit and debit cards to stablecoins and real-time bank transfers' with A2A x402 extension for crypto payments. Positions as universal protocol layer above payment rails rather than tied to specific networks.
framework.raw_quote: AP2 is designed as a universal protocol, providing security and trust for a variety of payments like stablecoins and cryptocurrencies.

source.title: Announcing Agent Payments Protocol (AP2) | Google Cloud Blog
